name: feature-loader-all-off
description: Phase 0 feature loader (ADR 0014) baseline — apply the 'default' profile (every feature off), screenshot. Must be pixel-identical to atlas-blob-compute-smoke for the same scene/camera. Load-bearing: this is the regression that proves the Phase 0 scaffolding didn't perturb the default render path.

commands: (() => { const all = window.__canaryGetAllFeatureStatus(); if (!all || all.ok === false) throw new Error('feature registry unavailable: ' + JSON.stringify(all)); for (const [k,v] of Object.entries(all)) { if (v.mode !== 'off') throw new Error('feature ' + k + ' was not off after default profile: ' + JSON.stringify(v)); } return 'all features off'; })()
